description: Update validates each present field locally before calling the API, and trims the label. entity_ids must be a non-empty array of non-blank strings on update (unlike create, where an empty array is accepted and omitted).

cases.name: rejects integer entity ids
cases.expect_error: entity_ids must be an array of non-empty strings

cases.name: rejects out-of-range severity
cases.expect_error: severity must be an integer from 0 through 3

cases.name: puts the update body with trimmed label
requires confirm
cases.expect_error: This updates a monitor alert definition. Set confirm=true to proceed.
